Off Calendar Sep-14-2021 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion To Enforce Settlement Under Ccp 664.6
Off Calendar Jul-22-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Ray Yetka, 415.357.0600 of Utretch & Lenvine, LLP for Plaintiff Rioja Red Ventures, LLC appearing via Zoom.
No other appearances.

Not argued. The Court states that the proof of service is good.

The Court rules as follows: PLAINTIFF RIOJA RED VENTURES, LLC Notice Of Motion To Enforce Settlement Under Ccp 664.6 is GRANTED. Plaintiff complied with the tentative ruling and provided a filed courtesy copy of a proof of service for the motion executed by the messenger referenced in the proof of service executed by Michelle Chan. No opposition filed. Prevailing party to prepare order. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
